# Eitan shop — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A simple online store focused on selling products. The user is looking to build a straightforward e-commerce website without complex features.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://eitan-shop-ca7943bf.zappy5.app
Discover the best tech gadgets and affordable home essentials at Eitan shop online store. Browse top deals, enjoy easy checkout, and get everything you need delivered fast. Start shopping now!

### About
https://eitan-shop-ca7943bf.zappy5.app/about
Meet the people behind Eitan shop online store — built with passion to bring you the best tech gadgets and everyday essentials at prices that make sense. Learn why thousands of shoppers trust us!

### Contact
https://eitan-shop-ca7943bf.zappy5.app/contact
Have a question about your order or need help finding the best tech gadgets online USA? Reach out to the Eitan shop team today — fast, friendly support is just one message away. Contact us now!

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Eitan shop
A simple online store focused on selling products. The user is looking to build a straightforward e-commerce website without complex features.

## Target Audience
- Online Shoppers in Israel
- Tech Gadget Enthusiasts
- Home Essentials Families

## Industry
מסחר אלקטרוני
